notes: Glossy droplets and short streaks around the impact point.
prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style water attacks. Show only glossy droplets, short spray streaks, and a few bright specular highlights around a compact splash impact. Keep the silhouette clean and readable for game compositing. No character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame.
negative_prompt: no checkerboard, no black background, no solid backdrop, no surf, no beam, no mist cloud that hides the droplets, no character, no arena, no UI
